title: Add namespace query helpers to memory backend
description: Implement database helpers for namespace introspection in the SQLite memory backend: one function to list namespaces with counts ordered descending, and one function to fetch recent entries for a namespace ordered by insertion time descending.
acceptance_criteria: memory.py exposes list_namespaces(db_path) returning namespace/count rows ordered by count descending.
memory.py exposes recent_entries(db_path, namespace, *, limit=5) returning id, namespace, text, and created_at for the most recent matching entries.
Query helpers return an empty list for a namespace with no rows and do not alter existing memory behavior.
